mission.title: keda: Scaler for  Amazon managed service for Prometheus
mission.description: Scaler for  Amazon managed service for Prometheus. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current keda deployment
steps.description:
Verify your keda version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
helm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working keda installation.

steps.title: Review keda configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant keda configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda
```
### Proposal

AWS' managed solution for Prometheus lets customers ingest metrics without the need to manage environment.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Scaler for  Amazon managed service for Prometheus" is functioning correctly.
